description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a low, light green fence and featuring a spacious front yard with outdoor furniture and trees. The main building has a large, hipped roof with dark shingles and a prominent central entryway, flanked by symmetrical windows and a balcony above the entrance. The property includes a detached garage to the right, connected by a paved driveway, and a patio area with a round table and chairs. The windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows, and the house exterior is finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding. The front yard is landscaped with two large trees and a paved walkway leading to the main door. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hipped roof, symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and a fenced yard featuring outdoor furniture and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balcony, symmetrical windows, two large trees, patio furniture, and the driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, the paved driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with multiple windows and the roof structure, less landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fence, patio area, and the side of the garage, with trees partially obscuring the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a covered porch, balcony above, and flanking columns.
